articles.title: Mexico’s Uber Crackdown at Airports to Complicate Plans for World Cup Visitors
articles.summary: Mexico is cracking down on the use of ride-hailing apps like Uber and Didi at the nation’s airports, causing headaches for travelers as it prepares to host the World Cup next month.

articles.title: Traders Dump Chipmakers as Rising Yields Drive US Stock Selloff
articles.summary: Traders dumped chipmakers and other high-flying technology shares following a weeks-long, record-setting rally as rising bond yields curbed Wall Street’s appetite for risky bets.

articles.title: Stocks Fall as Inflation Jitters Lift Bond Yields: Markets Wrap
articles.summary: A selloff in global bonds halted a rally in stocks, with concern intensifying that central banks will be forced to tighten policy to keep inflation in check amid persistently elevated oil prices.
